DynPog.Title: Dynamic Pog Tokens
DynPog.NoImages: No images found in source directory
DynPog.SettingsDefaultQualityHint: Quality mode selected when opening Dynamic Pog Tokens without a saved last-used state.
DynPog.SettingsDefaultTrimHint: Default circular edge trim in pixels.
DynPog.SettingsDefaultMaskHint: Whether background masking is enabled by default.
DynPog.SettingsDefaultPrefixHint: Default text added before each output filename.
DynPog.SettingsDefaultSuffixHint: Default text added after each output filename before the extension.
DynPog.SettingsDefaultFormatHint: Default file format for exported tokens.
DynPog.SettingsDefaultIncludeRingHint: Whether output files include the Foundry dynamic token ring by default.
DynPog.TooltipQuick: Quick: Source image stays the same size. A transparent background canvas extends the dimensions by 1/3.
DynPog.TooltipOptimized: Optimized: The final image will be 256, 512, 1024, 1536, or 2048. The source image will be resized to take up 2/3 of that.
DynPog.TooltipTrim: Trim: Make a circle crop on the source image to remove an existing ring.
DynPog.TooltipMask: Mask: Make the pixels outside the circle transparent. Required for JPEGs and other images without a transparent background.
DynPog.TooltipRingSize: Ring Size: Auto is typically the best setting. Force a particular size by changing the selection.
DynPog.TooltipPrefix: Prefix: Add text to the head of all token filenames.
DynPog.TooltipSuffix: Suffix: Add text to the end of all token filenames. (Before the extension.)
DynPog.TooltipIncludeRing: Include Ring: Print the dynamic ring to the token. Using this setting will hide the actual dynamic ring in Foundry.
